untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three non-price inputs: (1) Fundamental supply/demand imbalance detection - no fundamental indicators available; (2) Psychological/sentiment tone from news events - no sentiment or news indicators available; (3) Market response quantification to news - requires external event data. Technical component is translatable (price above/below 20-MA), but the core rule requires external data sources not present in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated only the technical component to price crossing sma_20 with 3-bar confirmation implicit in moving average logic. Entry uses crosses_above/below for directional alignment over 3+ bars. Exit uses pivot support/resistance (s1/r1) as proxy for technical support/resistance. Stop loss set to 1.5x risk per parameters. Cannot encode fundamental confirmation requirement or news-based psychological alignment without external data feeds.
